import hashlib
import gzip
import base64


def process_upload(file_data, max_size=1024):
    if len(file_data) > max_size:
        raise ValueError("File too large")

    compressed = gzip.compress(file_data)
    encoded = base64.b64encode(compressed)
    checksum = hashlib.sha256(encoded).hexdigest()

    return {"data": encoded, "checksum": checksum}


def validate_and_hash(payload, allowed_types):
    if payload.get("type") not in allowed_types:
        raise ValueError("Invalid type")

    serialized = json.dumps(payload, sort_keys=True).encode()
    digest = hashlib.sha256(serialized).hexdigest()
    return digest


def encode_token(data, secret, max_length=512):
    raw = json.dumps(data).encode()
    if len(raw) > max_length:
        raise ValueError("Token too long")

    encoded = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(raw)
    signature = hmac.new(secret, encoded, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()
    return f"{encoded.decode()}.{signature}"
